title: Commercial Portfolio

pages.text: Commercial Experience Portfolio www.shwetapaul.com SHWETA PAUL VERMA

OBJECTIVE WELCOME TO MY CREATIVE PORTFOLIO Seeking a uniquely creative and client-driven design position which distinctively set itself apart from other jobs as it sparked excitement for initial planning and design development with a focus in spatial relations and exploring new work trends.

Hello, my name is.... SHWETA PAUL VERMA A creative, passionate & proactive interior designer with more than 11+ years of design experience in several sectors like residential, commercial, mixed use & planning from several organizations in India and UAE. Being highly career driven and a very motivated designer with good communication and problem solving skills, my goal is to deliver high quality interiors while personally enhancing my skills to be a project lead. CREATIVE INNOVATIVE PRODUCTIVE COOPERATIVE

Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma My aim to shape spaces with “timeless designs” and want to be recognized as professional interior designer & asset to the company, providing solutions in the field of high-end corporate, commercial & residential interiors. My mission is to positively influence the lives of all colleagues & customers with whom we have the pleasure of working, & leave a lasting impression on their minds and imagination. The designs must inspire and elevate the hearts and minds of all those who lay eyes on it. The long- term goals are always in line with our core values. VISION MISSION
Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma PERSONAL SKILLS Client Presentation Concept Development AutoCad Interior Design Technical & detail Proficiency Material Selection Project Management

2007 Creative Portfolio 2008-2011 2011-2013 Shweta Paul Verma ACADEMICS BACKGROUND CBSE Board B.Sc. in Interior Design Himalaya Public school Non medical stream (67%) Punjab Technical University The graduation is completed along with graduate diploma in interior Design from JIMS. M.Sc. in Interior Design The subjects were specialized in Marketing, interior design studio and AutoCAD.
Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma WORK EXPERIENCE Vianaar Home pvt Ltd Studio Srijan Delta Faucet LineZ 'N' DesignZ Ankur & Associates
Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma BAY SQUARE OFFICE NOTABLE PROJECT (COMMERCIAL)

Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma “A Dialogue of Design and Purpose” The RNS Off ice at Bay Square redef ines the modern workplace through spatial fluidity and ref ined detail. Thoughtfully composed of open- plan work zones, executive suites, a shared conference, coffee and VIP lounges, and a vibrant reception core — the layout celebrates collaboration while maintaining quiet focus. With its play of textures, light, and bespoke f inishes, the design transforms functionality into experience — where every space inspires productivity with poise.
Let's work TOGETHER 00971 503083019 shwetapaulverma@gmail.com Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma

Creative Portfolio Shweta Paul Verma "A Symphony of Space & Style” The Ahuja Villa Layout harmoniously blends modern functionality with ref ined aesthetics. Spanning over 499 sqm, it gracefully weaves together living, dining, kitchen, lounge, and private suite zones to create a seamless flow between social vibrancy and serene retreat. Every line, texture, and f inish in this design celebrates contemporary luxury — where thoughtful planning meets timeless comfort."
